title: Investors are misreading news about the Iran war, analysts say as markets whipsaw
summary_full: Monday's declines put the brakes on another rapid recovery in global stock indexes akin to last year's 'liberation day' bounce.
summary_public: Monday's declines put the brakes on another rapid recovery in global stock indexes akin to last year's 'liberation day' bounce.
